commands.summary: Backend TypeScript build passed with governanceExport producing the redacted-by-default portable approval/audit history and an explicit full mode.

commands.command: node --test backend-dist/channels.test.js backend-dist/telnyx.test.js backend-dist/database.test.js backend-dist/migration.test.js backend-dist/server.test.js backend-dist/signals.test.js backend-dist/twilio.test.js
commands.summary: 92 backend tests passed, including AGH-018 redacted/full field sets, credential exclusion, the confirm_full gate (400 without confirmation), and operator-only route scoping.
Local audit passed after AGH-018 implementation and ledger updates; Phase 5 (audit, replay, integrity) complete.

environment.process_note: AGH-018: operator-only governance export (forgelink-governance-export-v1) of approval requests, decision records, outcomes, audit chain hashes, chain verification, and decision-memory rules; redacted by default (credentials never included; bodies/evidence/comments/summaries excluded), full export gated behind explicit operator confirmation.
